/src/app/app.component.html.code:
Dynamic Counter Buttons

Clicking a button increments only that button and adds a new 0 button below. Every button keeps its own count.

@for (button of buttons; track button.id) { }
Goal: each click grows the list by 1 and only the clicked button changes.
